features: Versatile Desk Lamps: Our desk lamps offer exceptional versatility with a swing arm, rotatable head, and adjustable body, perfect for any workspace. The C-clamp allows easy attachment to your desk edge, providing a stable and convenient lighting solution.

Efficient Lighting: Our desk lamps come with an E27 Edison screw bulb holder, compatible with GLS A60 bulbs. The included A60 LED bulb provides 595 lm at 3000 K, ensuring bright, warm lighting with a CRI>80, making it ideal for desk lamps office settings.

Sturdy and Reliable: The desk lamps feature a secure C‚Äëclamp/clip-on mount, easily attaching to any desk edge. Weighing ~3 kg, they offer stability and durability, while the 1.5 m cable with inline on/off switch ensures convenient operation for any desk lamp user.

Certified Quality: Our desk lamps are CE, UKCA, RoHS certified, featuring Class II insulation and IP20 rating. With a 3-year manufacturer warranty and ~25,000-hour bulb life expectancy, these desk lamps promise long-lasting performance and peace of mind.

Powerful Illumination: Designed for efficiency, our desk lamps support up to 60 W max power. When in stock, the included A60 LED ~7 W bulb offers energy-saving brilliance, enhancing productivity while reducing energy consumption, making them an ideal desk light choice.
description: Product Description TEKLED Modern Swing Arm LED Desk Lamp Features Eye Comfort Enjoy comfortable lighting designed to reduce eye strain. With flicker-free performance and warm 3000K light, this lamp is perfect for long hours of work or reading. Powerful & Efficient Equipped with a high-efficiency LED bulb and delivering 595 lumens, this desk lamp ensures bright illumination while keeping energy costs low. Includes a free LED bulb for instant setup.
